title: DSAS – Yoga Instructor, Pharmacist and More – 167 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Delhi State AYUSH Society Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 167 Yoga Instructor, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi State AYUSH Society (DSAS) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 167 Yoga Instructor, Pharmacist and More Posts. Candidates with Diploma, BAMS, BUMS, BHMS, MBA/PGDM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DSAS website, ayush.delhi.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of AYUSH, Govt. of NCT of Delhi under National Ayush Mission (NAM)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official DSAS/AYUSH Delhi portal at https://ayush.delhi.gov.in/. Online registration is mandatory — unregistered candidates will not be allowed to appear in the Interview. The online registration portal is active from 09-05-2026 to 25-05-2026. All updates related to the recruitment process will be provided through the official website only. No TA/DA shall be paid for attending the Interview.
seo_tags: Delhi State AYUSH Society Yoga Instructor
